title: Workspace path guard bypass on non-existent out-of-root symlink leaf
description: The assertNoPathAliasEscape function walks path segments to detect symlinks that escape the root boundary. When a symlink component is encountered and lstat succeeds, the function resolves it via realpath and checks containment. However, when a segment does not exist (lstat throws ENOENT), the loop breaks immediately without checking whether an earlier resolved symlink already pointed outside the root. This allows a symlink inside the workspace that targets a directory outside the root: if the final leaf path component does not yet exist, the ENOENT branch breaks the loop before the symlink escape is detected, permitting first-write escapes via out-of-root symlink targets.
